'''Kalut''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] in the [[Koba system/Legends|Koba system]]. He was heir to former Warlord [[Tulak]]. After [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]] escaped from the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] Tulak ordered her sealed in a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] prior, she decided to stay on Koba for a while and help the people of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Kalut was not fond of this and challenged her. When Yaddle evaded his lunge, he fell on his own dagger, fatally stabbing himself in the throat. In this way, he fulfilled Yaddle's prediction that Tulak and his kin would "die by [their] own hand," as victims of their own cruelty.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|5|Yaddle's Tale: The One Below}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
